name: Domain-Driven Design
description: Strategic and tactical DDD: ubiquitous language, bounded contexts, aggregates, and a domain model.

tasks.name: domain_analysis
bounded_contexts
tasks.prompt: Define the bounded contexts for this domain, the responsibilities of each, and the relationships (context map) between them.

tasks.name: aggregates
tasks.prompt: For each bounded context, identify the aggregates, aggregate roots, entities, and value objects, and the invariants each aggregate must protect.

tasks.name: domain_model
tasks.prompt: Produce the final domain model: a structured description of contexts, aggregates, domain events, and repositories, ready to hand to engineering.
